message:
feat(fnp-io): add big-endian dtype support for all numeric types

Extend IOSupportedDType with big-endian variants (I16Be, I32Be, I64Be,
U16Be, U32Be, U64Be, F32Be, F64Be) including descriptor encode/decode
roundtrip, item_size mapping, and npy read/write compatibility. Update
conformance fixtures: rename big-endian rejection test to invalid-width
(>i3) since >i4 is now a valid descriptor, and add a golden differential
case for big-endian i32 decoding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
